mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_outbox ( aggregate_type, aggregate_id, exchange_name, routing_key, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_at ) VALUES ( #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{exchangeName}, #{routingKey}, CAST(#{payload} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, #{nextRetryAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, exchange_name, routing_key, payload::text AS payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_at, sent_at, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM message_outbox WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, exchange_name, routing_key, payload::text AS payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_at, sent_at, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM message_outbox WHERE aggregate_type = 'RS_TASK' AND aggregate_id = #{taskId}

SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, exchange_name, routing_key, payload::text AS payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_at, sent_at, error_message, created_at, updated_at FROM message_outbox WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED', 'SENDING') AND retry_count < max_retry_count AND next_retry_at <= #{now} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE message_outbox SET status = 'SENDING', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, error_message = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'FAILED', 'SENDING') AND retry_count < max_retry_count AND next_retry_at <= #{now}
UPDATE message_outbox SET status = 'SENT', sent_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, error_message = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING'
UPDATE message_outbox SET status = 'SENT', sent_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, error_message = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'SENDING')
UPDATE message_outbox SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SENDING'
